Become a Culture Citizen

Welcome To The Kulturemonie Vendor Network

BECOME A MARKETPLACE VENDOR LIST YOUR CREATIVE IP APPLY AS A FESTIVAL PARTNER

KultureMonie Africa is building the largest culture-powered marketplace on the continent — and vendors are at the center of that ecosystem.

Whether you are a filmmaker, fashion brand, digital creator, festival organizer, artisan, writer, streaming content owner, or cultural entrepreneur — this is your gateway to structured revenue, continental visibility, and token-powered participation.

Why Sell On Kulturemonie?

KultureMonie integrates commerce, streaming, telecom, tokens, festivals, and creative finance into one interoperable system.

  • Continental audience
  • Token-integrated rewards
  • Streaming pipelines
  • Festival showcases
  • Creative funding pathways
  • Transparent revenue dashboards
  • Green/health brand positioning
  • KultureMonie Bank capital circulation

Who Can Become A Vendor?

  • Filmmakers & Production Houses
  • Musicians & Record Labels
  • Fashion Designers & Merch Brands
  • Artists & Cultural Artisans
  • Writers & Script Developers
  • Festival Organizers & Event Curators
  • Tourism & Experience Providers
  • Tech & Telecom Integration Partners
  • Digital Content Creators & Influencers
  • Corporate Cultural Sponsors

If you produce culture, experience, or creative IP — you belong here.

What You Can List

Physical Products

Goods

Merchandise / Cultural crafts / Fashion collections / Festival collectibles

Digital Products

Media & IP

Music and film / Podcasts and documentaries / Educational content / Digital art & tokenized collectibles

Experiences

Access

Festival tickets / Cinema access / Travel and heritage tours / VIP cultural access passes

Intellectual Property

Rights

Scripts / Film rights / Licensing agreements / Sponsored brand collaborations

How It Works

1️⃣ APPLY
Submit vendor application with basic business and product details
2️⃣ GET VERIFIED
Team reviews for quality, authenticity, and IP compliance
3️⃣ INTEGRATE
Connect listings to marketplace commerce / streaming / token rewards / festival showcases
4️⃣ START EARNING
Track revenue in real time through vendor dashboard

Revenue & Token Integration

  • KultureMonie Token (M8) rewards
  • CultureBuddie loyalty
  • Festival participation incentives
  • Creative funding eligibility
  • Green and health-linked impact channels

This increases customer retention and ecosystem stickiness.

Vendor Tiers

  • Standard Vendor — marketplace listing + basic dashboard
  • Pro Creator — streaming integration + token rewards
  • Festival Partner — showcase at KultureKulture and KultureRhyde festivals
  • Enterprise Partner — finance, telecom, sponsorship, and capital pooling

Built for Transparency

Every vendor has access to: Real-time sales tracking / Token participation reports / Allocation visibility / Impact contribution tracking / Festival performance metrics

We believe culture capital requires discipline and clarity.

Create Your Kulturemonie Vendor Store

1 Account Details2 Business Information3 Documents4 Payment Details5 Terms

At least 8 characters containing an upper case, a lower case and a numeric character

ADD BUSINESS INFORMATION
ADD PAYMENT DETAILS

Review details and continue.

Your vendor application has been received.
